Appearances:

Plaintiff CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORP, is present. Represented by
Attorney JOHN ZANGHI, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant DARRELL BROOKS, is present.
Attorney SUPRIYA MOLINA WUNSH, representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem GARY LOUIE , litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of MAY 16, 2011 is vacated.
